languages.text: {n}Визор техножреца скользит взглядом по лифту.{/n} "Суждение ошибочно. Машинные духи голодны, и мой функционал не позволяет их насытить. Алгоритм действий, предложенный мирянином, корректен: требуется погрузить лишние машины в блаженную дрему и перенаправить потоки Движущей Силы в контур хранилища".

traits.locale_text: {n}Визор техножреца скользит взглядом по лифту.{/n} "Суждение ошибочно. Машинные духи голодны, и мой функционал не позволяет их насытить. Алгоритм действий, предложенный мирянином, корректен: требуется погрузить лишние машины в блаженную дрему и перенаправить потоки Движущей Силы в контур хранилища".

languages.text: {n}The Tech-Priest's visor flashes in the direction of the lift.{/n} "The assessment is flawed. The machine spirits are ravenous, and my functionality does not allow me to satiate them. The algorithm of action proposed by the layperson is correct: it is necessary to plunge the excess machines into a blissful slumber and redirect the currents of Motive Force to the repository circuit."
languages.original_text: {n}Визор техножреца скользит взглядом по лифту.{/n} "Суждение ошибочно. Машинные духи голодны, и мой функционал не позволяет их насытить. The algorithm of action proposed by the layperson is correct: it is necessary to plunge the excess machines into a blissful slumber and redirect the currents of Motive Force to the repository circuit."

languages.text: {n}El visor del tecnosacerdote destella en dirección al ascensor.{/n} «Esa evaluación es errónea. Los espíritus máquina están hambrientos, y no dispongo de las funciones adecuadas para saciarlos. El algoritmo de acción propuesto por el laico es correcto: Es necesario sumir a las máquinas excedentes en un feliz letargo y redirigir la corriente de Fuerza Motriz al circuito de destino».
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest's visor flashes in the direction of the lift.{/n} "The assessment is flawed. The machine spirits are ravenous, and my functionality does not allow me to satiate them. The algorithm of action proposed by the layperson is correct: it is necessary to plunge the excess machines into a blissful slumber and redirect the currents of Motive Force to the repository circuit."

Los espíritus máquina están hambrientos, y no dispongo de las funciones adecuadas para saciarlos. El algoritmo de acción propuesto por el laico es correcto: Es necesario sumir a las máquinas excedentes en un feliz letargo y redirigir la corriente de Fuerza Motriz al circuito de destino».

languages.text: {n}这位技术神甫的目镜朝着电梯的方向闪了闪。{/n}“该评估存在缺陷。诸机魂正饥渴难耐，而我的职能上限不足以使其饱足。此教外人士所提议的行动算法正确：必须让冗余的机器陷入安宁的沉眠，并将源力的洪流重新导向储存回路。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest's visor flashes in the direction of the lift.{/n} "The assessment is flawed. The machine spirits are ravenous, and my functionality does not allow me to satiate them. The algorithm of action proposed by the layperson is correct: it is necessary to plunge the excess machines into a blissful slumber and redirect the currents of Motive Force to the repository circuit."

traits.locale_text: {n}这位技术神甫的目镜朝着电梯的方向闪了闪。{/n}“该评估存在缺陷。诸机魂正饥渴难耐，而我的职能上限不足以使其饱足。此教外人士所提议的行动算法正确：必须让冗余的机器陷入安宁的沉眠，并将源力的洪流重新导向储存回路。”

languages.text: {n}La visière du technoprêtre émet un éclat lumineux en direction de l'ascenseur.{/n} « Les résultats sont négatifs. Les esprits de la machine sont affamés, et mes fonctionnalités ne permettent pas de les rassasier. La séquence d'actions proposée par le profane est correcte : il est nécessaire de plonger les machines surnuméraires dans la béatitude du sommeil et de rediriger la Force Motrice vers le circuit de réserve. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest's visor flashes in the direction of the lift.{/n} "The assessment is flawed. The machine spirits are ravenous, and my functionality does not allow me to satiate them. The algorithm of action proposed by the layperson is correct: it is necessary to plunge the excess machines into a blissful slumber and redirect the currents of Motive Force to the repository circuit."

Les esprits de la machine sont affamés, et mes fonctionnalités ne permettent pas de les rassasier. La séquence d'actions proposée par le profane est correcte : il est nécessaire de plonger les machines surnuméraires dans la béatitude du sommeil et de rediriger la Force Motrice vers le circuit de réserve. »

languages.text: {n}Tekno Rahip'in vizörü, asansöre doğru parlıyor.{/n} "Değerlendirme kusurlu. Makine ruhları açgözlü ve işlevlerim onları doyurmama izin vermiyor. Avamın önerdiği eylem algoritması doğru: Fazla makineleri mutlu bir uykuya daldırmak ve Devinim Gücü'nün akımlarını depo devresine yönlendirmek gerekiyor."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest's visor flashes in the direction of the lift.{/n} "The assessment is flawed. The machine spirits are ravenous, and my functionality does not allow me to satiate them. The algorithm of action proposed by the layperson is correct: it is necessary to plunge the excess machines into a blissful slumber and redirect the currents of Motive Force to the repository circuit."

Avamın önerdiği eylem algoritması doğru: Fazla makineleri mutlu bir uykuya daldırmak ve Devinim Gücü'nün akımlarını depo devresine yönlendirmek gerekiyor."

languages.text: {n}Der Visor des Techpriesters blitzt in Richtung des Aufzugs.{/n} "Die Bewertung ist fehlerhaft. Die Maschinengeister sind ausgehungert, und meine Funktionalität erlaubt mir nicht, sie zu sättigen. Der von dem Laien vorgeschlagene Aktionsalgorithmus ist korrekt: Wir müssen die überschüssigen Maschinen in einen seligen Schlaf versetzen und die Strömungen der Antriebskraft auf das Repositorium umleiten."
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest's visor flashes in the direction of the lift.{/n} "The assessment is flawed. The machine spirits are ravenous, and my functionality does not allow me to satiate them. The algorithm of action proposed by the layperson is correct: it is necessary to plunge the excess machines into a blissful slumber and redirect the currents of Motive Force to the repository circuit."

Die Maschinengeister sind ausgehungert, und meine Funktionalität erlaubt mir nicht, sie zu sättigen. Der von dem Laien vorgeschlagene Aktionsalgorithmus ist korrekt: Wir müssen die überschüssigen Maschinen in einen seligen Schlaf versetzen und die Strömungen der Antriebskraft auf das Repositorium umleiten."

languages.text: {n}テクプリストのバイザーがエレベーターの方向に光る。{/n} 「評価は間違っている。機械霊は飢えている。私の機能では満足させることができない。一般人の提案する行動のアルゴリズムは正しい。余剰の機械は幸福な眠りにつき、動機力の流れは貯蔵回路に転向させる必要がある。」
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priest's visor flashes in the direction of the lift.{/n} "The assessment is flawed.
